scripts.dev:
node -e "console.log('
Learner: http://localhost:3000/
Admin:   http://localhost:3001/
')" && concurrently -n learner,admin -c cyan,magenta "npm run learner" "npm run admin"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,learner,admin -c green,cyan,magenta "npm run backend" "npm run learner" "npm run admin"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../course-compass-main && npm install && cd ../admin && npm install
scripts.build: cd course-compass-main && npm run build && cd ../admin && npm run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix course-compass-main run lint && npm --prefix admin run lint
